use_cases: Primary navigation menu for web applications and dashboards
Expandable navigation sections for organizing hierarchical menu items
Animated hamburger menu toggle for drawer-style navigation
ai_summary: A collapsible sidebar navigation component featuring an animated hamburger menu toggle that morphs between open/closed states using Framer Motion. Includes collapsible sections with smooth expand/collapse animations, hover effects on navigation items, and Lucide React icons for visual clarity. The minimalist design uses clean Tailwind styling suitable for dashboard and SaaS applications.
